title: What is Maturity?
introduction: Maturity is the staking reward you earn for participating in governance. It accumulates over time based on your neuron's voting activity and settings.

howItWorks.title: How it Works:
howItWorks.accrual: Maturity accumulates automatically as your neurons vote on proposals (either manually or via following).
howItWorks.rate: Higher dissolve delays and neuron age earn more maturity (up to {{max}}% APY).

modulation.title: Maturity Modulation:
modulation.description: Maturity conversion to ICP is non-deterministic. When disbursed, the rate varies between 0.95 to 1.05 ICP per unit of maturity (±5%) based on recent ICP/Cycles conversion rate trends.

managing.title: Managing Maturity:
managing.autoStake: Automatically uses maturity to increase your stake (compound growth).
managing.keepLiquid: Maturity stays available for you to disburse whenever you want.
managing.disburse: Convert maturity to ICP and add it to your available balance.
